title: BootstrapBulkAuditReport
description: Schema for the machine-readable JSON output of bulk_audit.py --json. Downstream tooling should depend on this structured output rather than parsing human-readable terminal text. Per-repo entries use the same semantic vocabulary as the bootstrap doctor JSON contract. Note: schema_version tracks the shape of this JSON contract independently of the bootstrap repo VERSION file — they are different versioning axes.

schema_version.description: Version of this JSON output contract — independent of the bootstrap repo VERSION file. Follows semver: patch = additive/clarifying changes or new optional fields; minor = new required fields or new enum values; major = renamed/removed required fields or semantically breaking changes.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this report was generated.

bootstrap_source_version.description: Bootstrap source repository version read from the VERSION file, or null if unreadable.

repo_count.description: Total number of repository paths considered (successful audits + errors).

repos.description: Per-repo audit results for all successfully audited repositories.

errors.description: Repos that could not be audited, with error details. Processing continues for other repos when one fails.

BulkSummary.description: Aggregate counts across all successfully audited repositories.

by_health_state.description: Count of repos in each health state. Uses the stable health state vocabulary from the bootstrap doctor contract. Consumers must handle unknown keys defensively — a minor version bump may add new state values.

by_profile.description: Count of repos by recorded or suggested profile. Key is the profile name (e.g., 'python-service', 'infra-repo', 'generic').

RepoAuditResult.description: Audit result for a single repository. Uses the same semantic fields as the bootstrap doctor JSON contract. Consumers must handle unknown enum values defensively.

target_dir.description: Absolute path to the target repository.

bootstrapped.description: True if a bootstrap marker file was found.

health_state.description: Overall bootstrap health classification. Stable vocabulary from the doctor contract.

AuditError.description: An error that prevented a repository from being audited.

repo_path.description: Path to the repository that could not be audited.

Recommendation.description: A structured recommendation. Consumers must branch on 'type', not parse 'value'.
